Transcript:
So, you have a name and you want to
figure out how to find somebody's
address. Okay, creepy. I don't feel good
about this, but I'll show you how to do
it for free. All you have to do is go to
Scraper City and they have a people
finder here and the $5 free credit
covers 250 searches. All you need to do
is type in their name and hit search.
Then you sign up. It's a free trial, so
you're not going to get charged unless
you let it continue. And like I said,
the first 250 searches are free. Then
you go on over to people finder and put
in the name. Scroll down and hit run
skip trace. It takes a second to find it
and when it's done, you download the
file. And then you get a file that has
the person, all of their associates
names and ages, any email that they
might have used throughout their life,
email one, email two, email three. You
get their current address, you get their
past addresses, any phone numbers they
might be associated with. Basically,
anything you need just based on a name.
Again, that is
scraperscity.com/peoplefinder.
All right, let me know what you think.
